headline: Vistra Stock Trades Above 50-Day SMA: Buy, Hold or Take Profits?
summary: VST is trading above its 50-day SMA at $165.53, up 43% y/y, as hedging, clean-power demand and a multi-fuel fleet support growth.

raw.headline: Vistra Stock Trades Above 50-Day SMA: Buy, Hold or Take Profits?

headline: Vistra Names Chief AI And Digital Officer As Investors Weigh Valuation
summary: Vistra (NYSE:VST) has appointed Damian Leach as Chief AI & Digital Officer. The new role is focused on accelerating AI and digital capabilities across the business. The appointment reflects Vistra's intent to strengthen operational consistency for clients in a complex global regulatory environment. Vistra, listed on the NYSE under ticker VST, operates in a sector where regulatory demands, data volume, and client expectations keep rising. While recent attention has centered on the company’s...
